DRIFT: Storybook carousel uses CSS translateX transitions. Live site uses Splide.js library with different animation

MINOR: Live carousel is inside the overlap container, not standalone
DRIFT: Live featured card is larger than standard card — occupies more grid columns in the overlap container

The AEM 'teaser' component is used in many places with different configs — it's the most versatile block and maps to multiple Storybook components

heroBorderRadiusAudit.verdict: The live site hero has a distinctive 64px top-left border-radius with overflow clipping on the image container. The Storybook HeroBanner component has NO border-radius and does NOT clip the image. This creates a significant visual mismatch. Additionally, the container radius varies by page type (medium-radius, large-radius on other containers).
